name: Shrimp a La William for Four (Modified)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the tomatoes by placing them in boiling water for about 1 minute to loosen the skin. Set aside to cool.
2. Sauté shrimp in oil for about 2 minutes on each side. Remove the shells. Season to taste (I used lime juice and hot pepper sauce). Set aside.
3. In the same pan, sauté onion until golden. Add the remaining ingredients: chopped tomatoes, garlic, saffron, white wine, salt, and pepper. Cook for 10 minutes.
4. Stir in the shrimp and let simmer for 3 minutes. Do not overcook the shrimp!
5. Serve over rice.
